title: Disk space never freed: a logical ref is keeped on a deleted BATs
poc: SELECT location FROM storage where table like 'test%';
key_bug_features: Logical reference retained after table deletion
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "test1" ("id" INT PRIMARY KEY, "data" CHARACTER LARGE OBJECT);
CREATE TABLE "test2" ("id" INT PRIMARY KEY, "info" VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
